deep_dive.title: PIER: Physics-Informed Environmental Retrieval for Time-Series Modeling
deep_dive.abstract: Accurate modeling of environmental systems is fundamental to scientific understanding and decision-making, yet remains challenging because observations are limited and physical dynamics vary across systems. Retrieval-augmented approaches offer a natural path to transfer knowledge across systems, but standard embedding-based retrieval does not guarantee consistency of underlying physical processes, since scenarios with similar embeddings may arise from different underlying mechanisms. We propose Physics-Informed Environmental Retrieval (PIER), a model-agnostic framework that augments embedding-based retrieval with a physics-aware stream that scores candidates by flux-response consistency with the target, using local verifiers trained on physics-derived flux features. A weight adjustment mechanism then learns per-scenario weights that adaptively balance the two retrieval streams based on diagnostic features summarizing physics-stream reliability. Experiments on 356 lakes across the Midwestern United States spanning 41 years show that PIER consistently outperforms baselines for water temperature and dissolved oxygen prediction, and serves as a general augmentation strategy across diverse backbones.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: physics-informed environmental retrieval for time-series modeling
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 物理信息驱动的环境时间序列检索
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 物理信息驱动的环境时间序列检索
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 物理信息驱动的环境时间序列检索
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: PIER augments embedding-based retrieval with physics-aware scoring using flux-response consistency, improving environmental system modeling under limited observations.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 环境系统建模因观测有限和物理动态多变而充满挑战。本文提出PIER框架，在嵌入检索基础上引入物理感知流，通过通量-响应一致性评分增强检索的物理合理性。该方法利用局部验证器实现跨系统知识迁移，提高了时间序列建模的准确性和鲁棒性，为物理信息驱动的环境建模提供了通用范式。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 环境系统建模因观测有限和物理动态多变而充满挑战。本文提出PIER框架，在嵌入检索基础上引入物理感知流，通过通量-响应一致性评分增强检索的物理合理性。该方法利用局部验证器实现跨系统知识迁移，提高了时间序列建模的准确性和鲁棒性，为物理信息驱动的环境建模提供了通用范式。

deep_dive.title: Label-Free Finite-Volume-Residual Training of Attention Graph Neural Networks for Coupled Thermo-Fluid Fields
deep_dive.abstract: Neural surrogates are widely used in scientific machine learning for fast prediction of three-dimensional (3D) thermo-fluid fields. However, generating training data using conventional numerical solvers often incurs substantial computational and storage costs. We propose to train an attention graph neural network by minimizing the finite-volume method (FVM) residuals of the governing equations. These residuals are evaluated directly on the mesh, requiring no labeled data. We evaluate the trained surrogates against computational fluid dynamics (CFD) references and a data-supervised baseline across four scenarios. On the two steady-state benchmarks, the FVM-loss model achieves an all-field normalized root-mean-square error (nRMSE) of 2.3-2.8%. It demonstrates close agreement with the CFD references, including the buoyancy-energy coupling. On the two parametric transient cases, the FVM-loss model outperforms the supervised baseline in terms of accuracy, while avoiding the data-generation cost entirely. These results indicate that the FVM loss can provide a practical training signal for neural surrogates and reduce the model development cost.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Label-free neural surrogate training using finite-volume residuals, directly transferable to air quality surrogate modeling
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 无标签神经代理训练，使用有限体积残差，可直接迁移到空气质量代理建模
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 无标签神经代理训练，使用有限体积残差，可直接迁移到空气质量代理建模
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 无标签神经代理训练，使用有限体积残差，可直接迁移到空气质量代理建模
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: This paper trains an attention graph neural network as a neural surrogate for thermo-fluid fields by minimizing finite-volume residuals, requiring no labeled data, achieving high accuracy compared to CFD.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对三维热流场快速预测问题，提出了一种无需标签数据的神经代理训练方法。通过最小化有限体积法（FVM）的残差来训练注意力图神经网络，替代传统的数值求解器。在稳态基准上，FVM损失模型达到了与计算流体动力学（CFD）参考相当的全场精度，展示了物理约束训练的强大能力。该方法可直接应用于空气质量和化学传输模型的代理建模，大幅降低数据生成成本。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文针对三维热流场快速预测问题，提出了一种无需标签数据的神经代理训练方法。通过最小化有限体积法（FVM）的残差来训练注意力图神经网络，替代传统的数值求解器。在稳态基准上，FVM损失模型达到了与计算流体动力学（CFD）参考相当的全场精度，展示了物理约束训练的强大能力。该方法可直接应用于空气质量和化学传输模型的代理建模，大幅降低数据生成成本。

quick_skim.title: Solver-in-the-loop training of deep learning closures for large-eddy simulation of turbulent premixed jet flames
quick_skim.abstract: Large-eddy simulation (LES) turbulence models often fail to capture the effects of chemical heat release and the resulting modulation of turbulence in premixed flames, underscoring the need for a framework that remains accurate across a broad range of physical regimes. We develop an augmented eddy-viscosity closure, based on deep neural networks calibrated jointly with the LES solution using adjoint-based optimization and differentiable programming, ensuring consistency with the governing partial differential equations (PDEs). Several objective functions and training methods are examined, and each model is assessed for its capability to interpolate and extrapolate across a wide range of Damköhler numbers. Relative to the Smagorinsky-model baseline, the best neural network model improves a posteriori errors in the LES primitive variables by 25-50% and in the resolved Reynolds stress and scalar flux by more than 60%. Crucially, the model generalizes across Damköhler number regimes, maintaining stability and accuracy even for out-of-sample conditions. These results demonstrate that PDE-consistent deep learning closures can recover both mean fields and resolved turbulence statistics in LES of turbulent premixed flames and can therefore provide a broadly applicable framework for turbulent combustion modeling.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: solver-in-the-loop training of deep learning closures for PDE-constrained LES
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 求解器在环训练深度学习闭合模型用于PDE约束的大涡模拟
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 求解器在环训练深度学习闭合模型用于PDE约束的大涡模拟
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 求解器在环训练深度学习闭合模型用于PDE约束的大涡模拟
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper develops a solver-in-the-loop training framework for deep learning closures in LES of premixed flames, using adjoint optimization to ensure consistency with governing PDEs.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文提出求解器在环训练框架，通过伴随优化和可微编程将深度学习闭合模型与大涡模拟求解器联合校准，确保与偏微分方程一致，在湍流预混火焰中展现跨工况泛化能力。

quick_skim.title: Hard conservation correctors can hide a degrading model when training autoregressive emulators
quick_skim.abstract: AI weather and climate emulators increasingly incorporate physical principles into their formulation. One approach is to apply hard correctors that modify network outputs so that global mass, water, or energy budgets close. Prior work introduced such training-time correctors in the CREDIT framework and reported reduced precipitation bias and improved stability. Motivated by those results, we fine-tuned a global atmosphere emulator with a water-budget corrector, using the corrected prediction in the supervised loss and evaluating through post-correction budget closure. By that measure, training appeared successful. Every delivered field closed the moisture budget to machine precision. However, raw precipitation developed a growing global low bias over 18 training epochs, while the required correction increased from about 2% to roughly 24%. The cause is a scale degeneracy. A uniform change in raw precipitation amplitude is offset by a compensating change in the correction factor, leaving the corrected field, and therefore the supervised loss, unchanged. This invariance removes the restoring force on raw precipitation amplitude, allowing other training pressures to drive drift. Two changes recovered stable behavior. We supervised the pre-correction prediction and penalized its raw budget imbalance, while the hard correction remained in place for the delivered field. The required correction returned to less than 1% within the next epoch. A controlled 2x2 ablation showed that the runaway occurred only when corrected-output supervision was combined with no imbalance penalty. Exact post-correction closure therefore says little about whether the raw model has learned the budget. When a corrector removes information from the loss, the raw fields and the applied correction need to be tracked.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: physics-informed training with conservation correctors in autoregressive emulators
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 自回归模拟器中的物理信息训练与守恒校正
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 自回归模拟器中的物理信息训练与守恒校正
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 自回归模拟器中的物理信息训练与守恒校正
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper studies the effect of hard conservation correctors in training autoregressive weather emulators, finding that while budget closure improves, raw precipitation quality degrades, highlighting pitfalls of physics-informed training.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文研究了在自回归天气模拟器训练中应用硬守恒校正的影响。结果显示，尽管预算闭合指标改善，但原始降水质量下降，揭示了物理信息训练中的潜在陷阱，对设计更可靠的物理约束方法具有警示意义。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文研究了在自回归天气模拟器训练中应用硬守恒校正的影响。结果显示，尽管预算闭合指标改善，但原始降水质量下降，揭示了物理信息训练中的潜在陷阱，对设计更可靠的物理约束方法具有警示意义。
